## Summary

Describe the behavior change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests/checks and listed them below.
- [ ] I updated docs or deployment examples if behavior changed.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a short recording.
- [ ] I did not include real secrets, tokens, private logs, or media paths.

## Orbix Constraints

- [ ] Offline browsing/playback after scan is preserved.
- [ ] Remote metadata providers are only used at scan/admin time.
- [ ] Kids safety remains server-enforced where catalog/playback behavior changed.
- [ ] Production media mounts remain read-only.
- [ ] Commits are signed off with `Signed-off-by` for DCO compliance.
